summary: Excellent DAT tape with crystal‑clear sound; reviewers love the recording even though no specific song details are given.
review: The single review praises the tape as a great example of peak DAT era recordings, calling it an excellent capture with no audible flaws. No particular songs or performance moments are mentioned, so the musical content is left unassessed beyond general enthusiasm.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one highly positive review (5 stars) focuses on recording quality; no detailed show commentary limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the tape as great, noting DAT/CD era fidelity and no issues with clarity or mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or performance quality.
